title: lilium canadense var. carolinianum
intro: Lilium canadense var. carolinianum, also known as the Carolina lily or Canadian tiger lily, is a perennial plant species native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lilium canadense var. carolinianum include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and calming skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and rhizomes are used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
